title: Consultation: Draft guidance on improving indoor air quality in office buildings - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Draft guidance on improving indoor air quality in office buildings

## Current status: Closed
Opened on February 11, 2023 and closed to new input on April 10, 2023.
Heath Canada has developed a document to provide stakeholders, partners, professionals and the general public with guidance on how to improve indoor air quality in office buildings. We are looking for comments on this draft document from interested parties.

## Join in: How to participate
Send an email to air@hc-sc.gc.ca with your ideas or comments to make yourself heard.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
This consultation is intended for scientific or technical audiences, including:
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- health protection agencies

## Key questions for discussion
We're looking for comments on these topics:
- the number of details in the guidance
- how the guidance can be improved for use during professional activities
Email: air@hc-sc.gc.ca
